features.name: static local variable with parameterized class type using class parameter
features.description: Code should include a static local variable declaration with a parameterized class type where the type parameter is itself a class type

features.name: class with type parameter containing static local variable
features.description: Code should include a class with a type parameter that contains a static local variable using a different parameterized class

features.name: parameterized class instantiation with class type parameter
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class instantiation where the type parameter is a class type, used in a static local variable context
